mapper.sql: a.id AS "id", a.user_id AS "user.id", a.office_id AS "office.id", a.area AS "area", a.name AS "name", a.sex AS "sex", a.file AS "file", a.in_date AS "inDate", a.create_by_id AS "createBy.id", a.create_time AS "createTime", a.update_by_id AS "updateBy.id", a.update_time AS "updateTime", a.remarks AS "remarks", a.del_flag AS "delFlag", user.name AS "user.name", office.name AS "office.name"
LEFT JOIN sys_user user ON user.id = a.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_office office ON office.id = a.office_id
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM test_data_main a
WHERE a.id = #{id} and a.del_flag = 0
